## CODEX (machine-readable metadata)

```yaml

findings_count:
  critical: [N]
  high: [N]
  medium: [N]
  low: [N]
status: [new | existing | broken | missing | mixed]
confidence: [HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW]
tokens_used: [approximate token count]
duration_seconds: [time taken]
```
